ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the chemical compound */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the compound */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the compound (proprietary, public database) */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was added to the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similarity_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity result entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the query made by the user */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being compared */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score computed between the query and compound */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used for similarity computation */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Additional details or metadata about the similarity result */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to compute the similarity score */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_results_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_smi" TEXT /* SMILES string entered by the user to search for similar compounds */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the query */,
  "query_details" TEXT /* Additional details or parameters used in the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., proprietary, public) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was integrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
